description: Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that expresses the ANGLE array relative to a designated reference angle. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = set_relang(switch, ibusex, id) ierr, switch,ibusex,id = set_relang()
python_syntax: ierr = set_relang(switch, ibusex, id) ierr, switch,ibusex,id = set_relang()

parameters.name: switch
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: ibusex
parameters.description: Relative angle calculation to be applied. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Machine identifier. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; ‘1’ by default) (if ICODE is positive).

switch.description: disable relative angle calculation (use absolute angles).

ibusex.description: use machine ID at bus IBUSEX as the reference machine.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
